Entries.{{ModId}}_Event_001/Friendship {{ModId}}: woodsTheme/8 9/{{ModId}}_Marigold 9 8 0 farmer 19 13 3/skippable/move farmer -10 0 0/pause 500/emote farmer 8/pause 500/move farmer -1 0 1/move farmer 0 -5 1/pause 500/faceDirection {{ModId}}_Marigold 3/pause 500/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "Hey @."/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "I was just looking at this statue. $8"/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "His name was Cannoli. He lived near here hundreds of years ago. $h"/emote farmer 16/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "I never met him of course! "/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "But my mother knew him as a child."/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "Fairies live a lot longer than humans."/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "Cannoli was very kind to fairies. "/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "Like us he enjoyed sweet food and being surrounded by nature. $h"/pause 200/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "Not everyone treats fairies well.. $8"/emote {{ModId}}_Marigold 28/pause 2000/emote {{ModId}}_Marigold 40/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "Sorry, I'm not feeling as cheerful as usual. $8"/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "Thinking about my parents gets me down sometimes. $s"/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "I miss them. $s"/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "It's been 50 years since they passed. $s"/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "Until you, I hadn't spoken to anyone in a really long time. $s"/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "I really appreciate that you keep coming to see me. $8"/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "I just hope I'm right to trust you. $8"/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "I need to be alone for a little while now, but thank you for listening to me. $8"/emote {{ModId}}_Marigold 20/pause 500/emote farmer 20/end dialogue {{ModId}}_Marigold "Hey @, thanks for listening to me earlier, it's nice to have you to talk to."

Entries.{{ModId}}_Event_002/Friendship {{ModId}}: woodsTheme/70 43/{{ModId}}_Marigold 61 32 2 farmer 82 39 3 Penny 71 50 2 Jas 69 50 2 Vincent 68 50 2/skippable/changeSprite {{ModId}}_Marigold Fairy/move {{ModId}}_Marigold 0 6 1/speak Penny "Can anyone tell me what kind of fish live in this water?"/jump Jas/speak Jas "I can! $4"/speak Penny "Go ahead Jas"/speak Jas "Freshwater fish!$1"/speak Penny "Good job Jas! $h"/speak Vincent "Oh man, I knew that $3"/speak Penny " That's okay Vincent, how about you tell me what freshwater means?"/viewport move 0 -2 2000/move farmer -9 0 3/emote farmer 8/viewport move 0 2 2000/faceDirection Penny 0/speak Penny "Hi @, we were just talking about fish!"/faceDirection farmer 2/speak Penny "You fish right? Would you tell Jas and Vincent about what you've caught?"/move farmer 0 9 2/faceDirection Penny 2/move {{ModId}}_Marigold 0 -6 0/end dialogue {{ModId}}_Marigold "Hi @.. "/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "You saw me earlier didn't you? $7 "/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "I heard them in the forest, they seem gentle. "/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "I think at some point I should learn to trust humans again.. $7"

Entries.{{ModId}}_Event_003/Friendship {{ModId}}: woodsTheme/6 7/{{ModId}}_Marigold 10 8 0 farmer 5 11 0/skippable/pause 1000/faceDirection {{ModId}}_Marigold 3/pause 500/emote {{ModId}}_Marigold 16/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "@, hi you're here!"/move {{ModId}}_Marigold -5 0 2/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "Come sit with me, I wanted to talk to you about something."/move {{ModId}}_Marigold 0 -3 0/move {{ModId}}_Marigold 3 0 1/move {{ModId}}_Marigold 0 2 0/showFrame {{ModId}}_Marigold 16/move farmer 0 -6 1/move farmer 5 0 3/showFrame farmer 117 true/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "So you've probably noticed I have some concerns about humans.. $7"/emote farmer 40/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "Well you need to know that humans and fairies have a complicated history.. "/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "Fairies have always sought to use magic to make the world better. "/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "To grow plants, protect animals, and promote harmony in nature. "/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "Humans however.. Humans often see magic as power. $8 "/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "Which means that sometimes, if they see an opportunity to gain magic, they might take it.. $8"/emote farmer 28/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "My father.. $8 "/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "He fell victim to this power grab.. $s "/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "80 years ago, he was taken from us.. $s "/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "A woman took him and took all the magic she could from him. $s "/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "When we found him he was... $s"/pause 2000/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "Well he was gone. $s"/emote farmer 28/pause 1000/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "After that I stayed away from humans. $8"/pause 1000/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "Until you. $7"/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "When you started visiting me, I was worried. $8 "/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "But you kept coming. "/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "Bringing gifts, talking to me, you were kind to my animals. $h "/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "I think I'm ready to trust humans again. "/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "Because of you. $h "/emote farmer 20/pause 1000/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "That's.. that's what I wanted to say. "/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "Thank you @ $h"/end

Entries.{{ModId}}_Event_004/LocalMail {{ModId}}_: woodsTheme/32 14/{{ModId}}_Marigold 32 9 0 farmer 33 22 0 Penny -10 -10 0 Jas -9 -9 0 Vincent -8 -8 0/skippable/faceDirection {{ModId}}_Marigold 2/pause 500/emote {{ModId}}_Marigold 20/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "@! Thank you for coming! $h"/emote farmer 20/move farmer 0 -13 3/faceDirection {{ModId}}_Marigold 1/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "So I've been thinking a lot about what we spoke about.. "/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "I'm ready to join this community. $h"/pause 1000/playSound doorOpen/warp Penny 32 22/move Penny 0 -4 0/playSound doorOpen/warp Jas 32 22/playSound doorOpen/warp Vincent 33 22/speak Penny "@? Are you here?"/faceDirection farmer 2/faceDirection {{ModId}}_Marigold 2/faceDirection Penny 1/faceDirection Penny 3/faceDirection Penny 0/jump Penny/emote Penny 16/jump Jas/jump Vincent/emote Jas 16 true/emote Vincent 16/speed Penny 5/move Penny 0 -5 0/speed Jas 5/speed Vincent 5/move Jas 0 -8 0 Vincent 0 -8 0/speak Penny "Is that...A fairy? $12"/speak Vincent "She has wings! $3"/speak Jas "She's so pretty! $3"/pause 500/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "Hi everyone.. I'm Marigold $9"/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "Actually Penny, I sent that note asking you to come.. $9 "/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "I wanted to meet you all. $9"/pause 1000/emote Penny 8/speak Penny "H.. Hi Marigold, how do you know who I am?"/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "I'm a friend of @, and.. and I've been watching you all in the forest. $7 "/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "I hope that doesn't seem creepy.. $7 "/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "I was trying to build up the courage to introduce myself.."/speak Jas "Are you a real fairy? $3"/pause 1000/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "I am! $9 "/speak Jas "Can I become a fairy? $1"/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "Well no.. It's not something you learn, it's something you just are. $h "/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "Like how a cow is a cow and a human is a human. $h"/speak Vincent "Can you teach me to fly? $1"/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "Well you need wings to fly, but I can tell you what it's like to be a fairy?"/speak Vincent "Yes! $1"/speak Jas "Yes please! $1"/emote Jas 56 true/emote Vincent 56/speak Penny "Ok both of you, let be nice and quiet and listen to Marigold."/end dialogue {{ModId}}_Marigold "Thank you for today @ $h "/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "After meeting Penny, Jas and Vincent, I'm ready to slowly meet the rest of the town! $h"

Entries.{{ModId}}_Event_007/Friendship {{ModId}}: continue/64 15/farmer 64 16 2 {{ModId}}_Marigold 64 18 0/pause 1500/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "Hi @. Listen, I have a date idea for tonight!#$b#Meet me outside my house at around 4pm?"/pause 300/end

Entries.{{ModId}}_Event_008/Friendship {{ModId}}: woodsTheme/7 10/farmer 8 14 0 {{ModId}}_Marigold 8 10 2/pause 1500/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "@! You made it!"/pause 500/emote {{ModId}}_Marigold 20/emote farmer 20/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "So.. To get to our date destination, I need to do something a little crazy.."/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "I'm gonna have to fly you there.. Do you trust me?"/question fork0 "Fly to date location?#Yes#No"/fork {{ModId}}_Date/playMusic none/pause 1000/emote {{ModId}}_Marigold 28/pause 400/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "I understand...Maybe another time.. $s"/pause 3000/end dialogue {{ModId}}_Marigold "I'm sorry you didn't feel comfortable flying with me.. $s"
Entries.{{ModId}}_Date: pause 200/emote {{ModId}}_Marigold 20/pause 500/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "Amazing! Don't worry I'll take care of you! Hang on! $h"/pause 500/changeSprite {{ModId}}_Marigold Fairy/move {{ModId}}_Marigold 0 3 0/fade/changeToTemporaryMap {{ModId}}_Date true/viewport {{ModId}}_Marigold true/viewport move 0 -3 1000/warp {{ModId}}_Marigold 11 11/warp farmer 12 11/faceDirection {{ModId}}_Marigold 2/faceDirection farmer 2/fade unfade/pause 500/changeSprite {{ModId}}_Marigold/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "We're here! $9"/pause 3000/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "This is one of my favourite spots to fly out to! $9"/pause 1000/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "It used to be a road into town, but it's gotten long overgrown."/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "I've set us up with a picnic! $h"/emote farmer 20/pause 1000/move {{ModId}}_Marigold 0 3 2 farmer 0 3 2/pause 1000/farmerEat 221/faceDirection {{ModId}}_Marigold 1/pause 1000/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "Listen @.."/faceDirection farmer 3/pause 500/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "I just want to say that the time I've spent with you has been really special.. $l"/pause 500/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "You've helped me to trust humans again and feel safe. $l"/pause 500/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "Now I know, not every human is going to use me for my magic, and a lot of humans are really after friendship and love. $l"/pause 500/speak {{ModId}}_Marigold "@, I love you. $l"/positionOffset farmer 16 0 true/animate farmer true true 100 101/positionOffset farmer -2 0/pause 50/positionOffset farmer -2 0/pause 50/positionOffset farmer -2 0/pause 50/positionOffset farmer -2 0/pause 50/showFrame {{ModId}}_Marigold 28/pause 500/positionOffset {{ModId}}_Marigold 2 0/pause 50/positionOffset farmer -2 0/positionOffset {{ModId}}_Marigold 2 0/pause 50/positionOffset farmer -2 0/positionOffset {{ModId}}_Marigold 2 0/pause 50/positionOffset farmer -2 0/positionOffset {{ModId}}_Marigold 2 0/pause 50/positionOffset farmer -2 0/positionOffset {{ModId}}_Marigold 2 0/pause 50/positionOffset farmer -2 0/positionOffset {{ModId}}_Marigold 2 0/pause 50/positionOffset farmer -2 0/positionOffset {{ModId}}_Marigold 2 0/end dialogue {{ModId}}_Marigold "Thanks for today, I love you so much! $l"
